records.ety: [OE. uddir, AS. ūder; akin to D. uijer, G. euter, OHG. ūtar, ūtiro, Icel. jūgr, Sw. jufver, jur, Dan. yver, L. uber, Gr. o"y^qar, Skr. ūdhar. √216. Cf. Exuberant.]

defs: The glandular organ in which milk is secreted and stored; -- popularly called the bag in cows and other quadrupeds. See Mamma.
quotes: A lioness, with udders all drawn dry.

defs: One of the breasts of a woman.
quotes: Yon Juno of majestic size, With cowlike udders, and with oxlike eyes.
